canonical_answer: A white scalloped-edge ceramic bowl sits on a wooden cutting board containing white malagkit rice grains. A clear liquid stream pours into the bowl, followed by a blue silicone spatula stirring the mixture. The liquid becomes cloudy white as the spatula is lifted out of the bowl. Text displaying instructions to soak the rice appears on screen.

question: Describe the sequence of physical actions performed on the rice during the preparation scene.
canonical_answer: At 12s, water pours into a white scalloped bowl holding white rice; at 14s, a blue spatula stirs the grains within the liquid; at 16s, the spatula lifts out leaving cloudy water behind.

question: Outline the visual changes occurring to the ingredients and tools throughout the soaking process.
canonical_answer: At 12s, a clear liquid stream hits white grains in a ceramic bowl; at 14s, a blue silicone tool mixes the contents on a wooden board; at 16s, the liquid turns opaque white as stirring stops.
